channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Preview of the Los Angeles Pride parade
item.description: ABC News' Gio Benitez, co-hosting the parade coverage, previews what to expect at one of America's largest Pride events.

item.title: Trump urged states to avoid AI regulations, but some are moving forward anyway
item.description: Six months after President Donald Trump advised states against regulating artificial intelligence, several are increasingly doing so.

item.title: Sen. Mark Warner hopes Senate can confirm Trump's DNI pick "this week"
item.description: The Senate remains deadlocked over the president's controversial acting intelligence chief nominee, leading to the expiration of a key authority.

item.title: Transcript: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," June 14, 2026
item.description: Below is the transcript of Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth's interview on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan" aired June 14, 2026.
